meaning: n.[古生]祖龙,古蜥(一种古爬行动物)
examples: Among the remnants are rare fragments of land life that survived the same period, including part of a conifer plant and the tooth of an archosaur reptile.
The tooth of an archosaur, left, which was a direct ancestor of many dinosaurs, and the complete skeleton, including soft tissue of a horseshoe crab, right.
Dinosaurs split off early from the crocodile family tree, paleontologists suggested Wednesday, based on the discovery of a 240-million-year-old fossil "archosaur."
